title: Brazilian Fondue Chicken
description: A twist on traditional fondue, this Brazilian-inspired dish features succulent chicken cooked in a rich and creamy fondue sauce, served with a side of iced vegetables for a refreshing contrast.

ingredients.name: Brazilian cheese
ingredients.notes: available at most international grocery stores

ingredients.name: Iced vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, broccoli, or cauliflower

instructions: Heat the fondue mix according to the package instructions.
Add the shredded Brazilian cheese to the fondue and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the chicken to the fondue and cook until browned and cooked through.
Stir in the Worcestershire sauce and chili flakes, if using.
Transfer the chicken to a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the chicken with a side of iced vegetables for a refreshing contrast.
To assemble the fondue, place the chicken and vegetables on a platter and serve with the fondue sauce for dipping.
